rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ERNESTO & VANGUM MOI REVOCABLE U/D/T 2/8/1994 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of Pinky Ho, Yan Ping Liang, And The Sharon Chinese Baptist Church Of San Francisco To Financial Elder Abuse Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Respondent's demurrer is overruled. The challenged cause of action contests the validity of trust documents and comes within at least the concurrent jurisdiction of the Probate Court, and the issues raised by this cause of action are identical to or intertwined with the issues raised by the other causes of action that are clearly within the exclusive jurisdiction of the Probate Court. Petitioner's request for an award of attorneys' fees is denied. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wedndesday, December 14, 2016.
